title: atrostemma hammelii
intro: Atrostemma hammelii, also known as the "Tropical Milkweed," is a plant species in the family Passifloraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant's extracts have been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and even showing potential in cancer treatment. Atrostemma hammelii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential side effects.
